name: recoil_app_intro_fmv_on_update_should_quit
description: RecoilApp_IntroFmvState::OnUpdateShouldQuit skips directly to the mission FMV state when intro skip is set, otherwise updates the intro FMV script and queues the main-menu prep state when playback finishes.
known_limits: VC5SP3 compile-only target coverage exists through recoil_app_create_main_wnd; Binary Ninja byte comparison is still pending for RecoilApp_IntroFmvState::OnUpdateShouldQuit.
Source dependencies are accepted as limited because the FMV update path is functional-equivalent while its zInput provider leaves remain class-pass binary debt.
